subject: [PATCH v6 6/6] nfsd: export NFSv4 callback op stats via netlink

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to export NFSv4 callback operation statistics via netlink, allowing nfsstat to report counts of backchannel operations over netlink. The stats are added as a nested attribute in the server-stats netlink dump, reusing the existing layout for scalar stats. This includes counting CB_GETATTR operations, which corresponds to the procfs wdeleg_getattr line.
